title.en: 'Passive' and 'crumbled' - did Tuchel's defensive tactics cost England?
title.zh-CN: “被动”和“崩溃” --图切尔的防御战术是否让英格兰付出了代价？

summary.en: England went 1-0 up against Argentina before slumping to a heart-breaking semi-final defeat. But did boss Thomas Tuchel's "negative" tactics cost the Three Lions a place in the World Cup final?
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队以1比0击败阿根廷队，然后陷入令人心碎的半决赛失利。但是，老板托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）的“消极”策略让三狮队在世界杯决赛中失去了一席之地吗？

title.en: Why England's loss to Argentina felt like most painful in 60 years of hurt
title.zh-CN: 为什么英格兰输给阿根廷是60年来最痛苦的伤病

summary.en: England's years of hurt will now stretch beyond 60, but the late collapse to a World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina may be the most painful wound of all.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队多年的伤病现在将延续到60岁之后，但阿根廷队在世界杯半决赛中的失利可能是最痛苦的伤口。

title.en: Defeat will haunt England for a long time, says Burn
title.zh-CN: 伯恩说，失败将长期困扰英格兰

summary.en: England defender Dan Burn says the World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina will haunt him.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰后卫丹·伯恩（ Dan Burn ）表示，阿根廷世界杯半决赛的失利将困扰他。

title.en: Tuchel retains FA backing despite England defeat
title.zh-CN: 尽管英格兰队失利，图切尔仍然获得足总的支持

summary.en: Thomas Tuchel retains the backing of the Football Association despite England failing to reach the World Cup final.
summary.zh-CN: 尽管英格兰未能进入世界杯决赛，托马斯·图切尔仍然得到了足球协会的支持。

title.en: Prince William tells England to 'hold heads high'
title.zh-CN: 威廉王子告诉英格兰“高举头”

summary.en: The Prince of Wales says England has "inspired us all" as he offers his commiserations over the loss to Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 威尔士亲王表示，英格兰“激励了我们所有人” ，因为他对阿根廷的失利表示同情。

title.en: Football Daily

summary.en: Did defensive tactics cost England a place in the World Cup final?
summary.zh-CN: 防守战术是否让英格兰队在世界杯决赛中失去了一席之地？

title.en: How the papers reacted to England's World Cup semi-final loss...
title.zh-CN: 论文对英格兰世界杯半决赛失利的反应……

title.en: 'Gutted' Harry Kane on Messi, Argentina and devastation of World Cup exit – video
title.zh-CN: “内脏”哈里凯恩在阿根廷梅西和世界杯退出的破坏–视频

summary.en: “I think there's not much to say. For now, everyone has to process what's just happened,” Harry Kane said after the defending champions, Argentina, rallied to beat England 2-1 and reach the World Cup...
summary.zh-CN: “我觉得没什么好说的。现在，每个人都必须处理刚刚发生的事情，”哈里·凯恩在卫冕冠军阿根廷队以2比1击败英格兰队并进入世界杯后说道。

title.en: Argentina shatter England's World Cup dreams in semi-final
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷在半决赛中打破英格兰世界杯的梦想

summary.en: Argentina shatter England's World Cup dreams, scoring two late goals to come from behind and knock out Thomas Tuchel's side, in a dramatic semi-final in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷队打破了英格兰队的世界杯梦想，在亚特兰大的一场戏剧性的半决赛中，他们从后面打进了两个进球，并击败了托马斯·图切尔的球队。

title.en: Argentina face disciplinary action over Falklands banner after semi-final
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷在半决赛后面临对福克兰群岛旗帜的纪律处分

summary.en: Argentina face the prospect of disciplinary action from Fifa after their players celebrate the World Cup semi-final win against England with a banner in support of their country's claims to the...
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷的球员在庆祝世界杯半决赛战胜英格兰后，将面临国际足联的纪律处分，他们的旗帜支持他们的国家声称...

title.en: 'Gutted' - Kane disappointed over World Cup exit
title.zh-CN: “沮丧” -凯恩对世界杯退出感到失望

summary.en: England captain Harry Kane gives his analysis on their defeat against Argentina in the 2026 World Cup semi-final at Atlanta Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队队长哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）分析了他们在亚特兰大体育场举行的2026年世界杯半决赛中击败阿根廷的情况。

title.en: Argentina celebrate progressing to World Cup final
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷庆祝晋级世界杯决赛

summary.en: Defending champions Argentina celebrate at full time, after beating England 2-1 to make it through to their second successive World Cup final.
summary.zh-CN: 卫冕冠军阿根廷队以2比1击败英格兰队，连续第二次进入世界杯决赛后，全职庆祝。

title.en: Gordon puts England ahead against Argentina
title.zh-CN: 戈登让英格兰队战胜阿根廷队

summary.en: Anthony Gordon puts England 1-0 up against Argentina in the 2026 World Cup semi-final at the Atlanta Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 安东尼·戈登在亚特兰大体育场举行的2026年世界杯半决赛中以1比0击败阿根廷。

title.en: Headers caused Stiles' brain disease, coroner finds
title.zh-CN: 头部引起斯泰尔斯的脑部疾病，验尸官发现

summary.en: England 1966 World Cup winner Nobby Stiles died with a condition caused by heading footballs, his inquest concludes.
summary.zh-CN: 他的研究结束时，英格兰1966年世界杯冠军诺比·斯泰尔斯（ Nobby Stiles ）因头球引起的疾病去世。

title.en: Bournemouth in talks for Benfica defender Silva
title.zh-CN: 伯恩茅斯与本菲卡后卫席尔瓦会谈

summary.en: Bournemouth enter talks to sign Benfica and Portugal defender Antonio Silva as Marcos Senesi's replacement.
summary.zh-CN: 伯恩茅斯进入谈判，签下本菲卡和葡萄牙后卫安东尼奥·席尔瓦作为马科斯·塞内西的替补。

summary.en: London City Lionesses sign France forward Kadidiatou Diani from Lyon on a three-year deal.

summary.en: Both England and Argentina's national anthems are drowned out by crowd noise, before the teams kick off their 2026 World Cup semi-final at the Atlanta Stadium.
